hooks.command: WPATH=$(jq -r '.worktree_path // .path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$WPATH" ] && [ -d "$WPATH/frontend" ]; then ln -sf /Users/chulhee/src/epigram/frontend/node_modules "$WPATH/frontend/node_modules" && ln -sf /Users/chulhee/src/epigram/frontend/.env.local "$WPATH/frontend/.env.local" && lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; cd "$WPATH/frontend" && /Users/chulhee/src/epigram/frontend/node_modules/.bin/next dev &> /tmp/epigram-worktree-dev.log & fi
